string.name: location_reason
string.value: Used to get weather info for your current location

string.name: clear_cache_msg
string.value: Clear all cached weather data? City history will not be affected.

string.name: tip_hot
string.value: Beware of heatstroke! Stay hydrated and avoid peak sun hours.

string.name: tip_cold
string.value: Water may freeze. Watch out for icy roads.

string.name: tip_rain
string.value: Bring an umbrella and watch your step.

string.name: tip_fog
string.value: Low visibility. Use fog lights when driving.

string.name: tip_wind
string.value: Strong winds. Watch for falling objects.

string.name: tip_big_diff
string.value: Large temperature difference. Dress in layers.

string.name: tip_nice
string.value: Great weather today! Perfect for outdoor activities.

string.name: err_qweather_perm
string.value: Weather API permissions syncing, retry later

string.name: err_amap_fail
string.value: City lookup failed, try another city

string.name: err_network
string.value: Network error, please check your connection
